name: Frittata Ranchera
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and green pepper in 1 tablespoon butter until softened.
2. Stir in ham and beans. Heat to warm; remove from heat.
3. Meanwhile, beat together eggs and water.
4. Heat remaining butter in skillet until just hot enough to sizzle.
5. Add eggs to the skillet and cook over low heat until set.
6. Pour heated bean mixture evenly over eggs; cover tightly.
7. Cook until eggs reach desired doneness.
8. Cut into wedges to serve. Serves 4-6
